prompt:
Subject: Japanese goldfish aquarium portrait

Person/Expression: Young woman with black hair, soft bangs and loose strands with a wet look, translucent skin, natural and delicate makeup, moist eyes, a quiet and fantastical expression looking slightly upwards.

Clothing/Pose: Pale cream yukata-style top, modest cherry blossom or Japanese patterns, water glisten reflecting around shoulders, a natural posture as if floating underwater surrounded by goldfish with the body slightly sideways.

Background/Light: A fantastical space reminiscent of a Japanese goldfish art aquarium, turquoise tanks, reflections through glass, elegant Japanese pattern decorations, countless red, white, and orange goldfish, fine bubbles, surface ripples, an atmosphere like a poetic expansion of a summer festival goldfish scooping game.

Composition/Camera: 9:16 vertical composition, profile-leaning close-up, upward-looking perspective from a low angle, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, foreground goldfish heavily blurred, cinematic composition feeling light ahead of the gaze.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, realistic skin texture visible down to pores and grain, transparency like underwater photography, vibrant colors of turquoise blue and goldfish orange, cinematic lighting, a dreamlike and poetic Japanese-style portrait.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange eye lines, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, unnatural fish, broken yukata, excessive processing, excessive skin retouching, overexposure, AI-specific unnatural textures, text, logos, watermarks.
